channel.title: +MT on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +MT on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Long arc
item.description: 202107 Some sociobiologists have speculated that the long arc of the 1918 Spanish Flu was what led to the rise of National Socialism in Ger and the events culminating in WWII. This extrapolation is from the well supported correlation between behavioral/personality traits & disease load. The Wuhan disease has already caused overt aggravating effects: Some people have (massively) suffered while others have hugely profited. There will probably be long term consequences of this.
